authorOptions.text:
Author: Luckyone (EU) - LaughingSkull

Credits: AcidWeb, Azilroka, Buds, Simpy, Stanzilla

Discord: discord.gg/xRY4bwA

init.custom:
-- Keystone item IDs
aura_env.ids = {
    [138019] = true, -- Legion Dungeons
    [158923] = true, -- BFA Dungeons
    [180653] = true, -- Shadowlands & Dragonflight Dungeons
    [187786] = true, -- Legion Timewalking Dungeons
    [151086] = true, -- Tournament Realm & Beta Dungeons
}

-- Custom options
aura_env.options = {'party', 'guild', 'spam'}
aura_env.types = {}

for _, v in ipairs(aura_env.options) do
    if aura_env.config['enabled'..v] then
        aura_env.types[v] = true
    end
end

-- Force update on init
aura_env.key = nil

-- Search the bags for the item IDs from the table above
aura_env.update = function()
    aura_env.keys = {}
    
    for bag = 0, NUM_BAG_SLOTS do
        local bagSlots = C_Container.GetContainerNumSlots(bag)
        for slot = 1, bagSlots do
            local info = C_Container.GetContainerItemInfo(bag, slot)
            if info then
                local itemID, hyperlink = info.itemID, info.hyperlink
                if aura_env.ids[itemID] then
                    aura_env.keys[itemID] = hyperlink
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

-- Send message to channel
aura_env.link = function(channel)
    -- No key found, force update
    if not aura_env.keys then aura_env.update() end
    
    -- Key found - link it in chat
    if aura_env.keys then
        aura_env.message = ''
        
        for _, link in next, aura_env.keys do
            aura_env.message = (aura_env.message ~= '' and (aura_env.message..' & ') or '')..link
        end
        
        if aura_env.message ~= '' then
            SendChatMessage(aura_env.message, channel)
        end
    end
end

do -- Anti-Spam check
    local spamTimes = { GUILD = 0, PARTY = 0 }
    aura_env.isSpam = function(channel)
        local current = GetTime()
        if current > spamTimes[channel] then
            spamTimes[channel] = current + 30 -- Next allowed time in seconds
            return false
        else
            return true -- Its still spam
        end
    end
end

trigger.custom:
function(event, message)
    if not aura_env.config.guild and not aura_env.config.party then return end
    if event == 'BAG_UPDATE_DELAYED' then
        aura_env.update()
    elseif message and strlower(message) == '!keys' then
        local channel = (event == 'CHAT_MSG_GUILD' and 'GUILD') or 'PARTY'
        if (channel == 'GUILD' and not aura_env.config.guild) or (channel == 'PARTY' and not aura_env.config.party) then return end
        if aura_env.config.spam and aura_env.isSpam(channel) then return end
        aura_env.link(channel)
    end
end
